functional_audit.check: ChatPanelMount (bTIUt) renders DS-06 ChatReusable shell when ?conversation= is set — not legacy ChatWindow or placeholder panel
Active conversation message list loads from chatMessagesApi and displays in ChatMessagesList
bTIUt ChatReusable mount and CHAT-06 welcome panel are mutually exclusive based on ?conversation= param
Composer send inserts user message and refreshes thread (not dead handler or Coming Soon stub)

ui_evidence.notes: CustomElement mount on ChatPanelMount when conversation param present; flex h-full column fills right panel per layout_notes
ChatReusable RE root nested inside bTIUt; header/messages/composer/disclaimer stack from DS-06

critiques.finding: useCoachingModeUpdate in ChatPanelMount updates local React state for mode badge text only; coaching mode is not persisted to chatconversation context field — decompose assigns full mode workflow wiring to CHAT-05.
critiques.alternative: On mode select, call chatconversation update RPC or context-field patch and reload conversation meta so bTIRi badge reflects stored mode.

critiques.finding: ChatPanelMount loading branch renders generic "Loading conversation…" text without data-bubble-id markers; bTIUt/bTIRW subtree is absent until load completes.
critiques.alternative: Render bTIUt wrapper immediately with skeleton placeholders carrying DS-06 region markers, or reuse ChatReusable with loading prop per IR visibility semantics.

critiques.finding: ChatConversation title/mode metadata is derived from sidebar list fetch (conversations.find) rather than a direct chatconversation row read; deep-linked ?conversation= ids not yet in list show default title until sidebar reload.
critiques.alternative: Fetch single chatconversation row by id in ChatPanelMount reload() alongside messages for accurate header binding.
